text.tspan: API Key Auth: Bearer sk-tl-{prefix}.{secret} → SHA-256 → Redis check → miss: PG lookup by prefix → bcrypt.compare → check expiry + IP allowlist + scopes → cache 30s TTL → return ApiKeyIdentity

text.tspan: Free: 5 incidents/day, 10 triage, 60 API/min | Starter: 25/day, 50 triage, 120/min | Pro: 100/day, 200 triage, 300/min | Enterprise: 500/day, 1000 triage, 600/min

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji'
text.tspan: Failure: payment.failed → PAST_DUE → grace period (48h) → auto-cancel → downgrade to Free | Trial: 14-day → reminder emails → expire → Free

text.tspan: Browser → Next.js → getAuth() → Redis (cache check) → Stytch (validate) → PostgreSQL (user lookup) → Redis (cache set) → AuthContext returned

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji'
text.tspan: Webhook → Next.js → HMAC verify → payload map → PostgreSQL (create incident) → Redis (quota check) → SQS (enqueue reminder) → Slack (alert)

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji'
text.tspan: Cron → SQS (enqueue) → Worker (poll) → PostgreSQL (load incident) → Resend (email) / Twilio (SMS P1) / VAPID (push) → SQS (re-enqueue if open)

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji'
text.tspan: Dodo webhook → Next.js → verify → PostgreSQL (update billing) → apply plan tier → Redis (invalidate plan cache) → adjust quotas + feature gates

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji'
text.tspan: AI Triage → decrypt BYOK key (AES-256-GCM) → OpenAI/Gemini/Anthropic → parse severity+category → PostgreSQL (update incident) → auto-escalate P1
